prerequisites.value: Whether through an elixir of two worlds or other means, one of your parents was aquatic and the other was a land-dweller. You are mostly a normal member of your race, except as stated in this feat. You must select this feat at 1st level, and you canât have other feats, traits, or abilities that specify your bloodline such as Racial Heritage. Thematically appropriate backgrounds include Adopted O

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a land speed of 10 feet if you are aquatic; if you arenât aquatic, you gain a +4 racial bonus on Swim checks that doesnât stack with the bonus for having a swim speed. Goal: You must live among your other parentâs race (the aquatic parent if you are a land-dweller or the land-dwelling parent if you are aquatic), learning to adapt to their strange world and culture until others of that race truly accept you. It isnât enough to simply find a member of the appropriate race and badger or sweet-talk them until they agree to accept you; you must perform significant rites of passage and form real bonds with members of your other parentâs race. Completion Benefit: You gain the amphibious subtype (and the aquatic subtype, if you donât have it) and can breathe both water and air with equal ease. As a swift action, you can transform your feet into a tail fin (gaining a swim speed of 40 feet) or your tail fin into feet (gaining a land speed of 30 feet), changing back and forth as often as you wish.
